title: Leveraging epigenomics and contactomics data to investigate SNP pairs in GWAS.
author: Manduchi E Williams SM Chesi A Johnson ME Wells AD Grant SFA Moore JH
content: S-EPMC5996751 PMC5996751 Leveraging epigenomics and contactomics data to investigate SNP pairs in GWAS. Although Genome Wide Association Studies (GWAS) have led to many valuable insights into the genetic bases of common diseases over the past decade, the issue of missing heritability has surfaced
